title: fix: reply composer grows with content
description:
The reply `<textarea>` was locked to two rows, so long replies scrolled inside a tiny box.

This makes it grow with the content and gives `truncate` a sane default. See the [issue](https://git.openape.ai/openape-ai/openape-chat/issues/42).

- `ReplyBox.vue`: `:rows="autoRows"`
- `format.ts`: default length + real ellipsis
author: scribe
